specs.title: Coverage ratchet-up — restore per-package thresholds to the 90% target
specs.archiveNote: 10 PRs merged to staging (#1663/#1664/#1665/#1666/#1668/#1671/#1673/#1674/#1676/#1684 + closeout #1677). Logic packages raised to/past target: icons 56->100, billing 87->99, schemas 83->95, notifications 80->99, feedback 43->95, seed 75->97, service-core 78->90.25. Both threshold systems (per-package vitest.config + ci.yml coverage-check floors) ratcheted in lockstep; icons/billing/schemas/notifications/seed/feedback rejoined the 90 default, service-core floored at 88 (real 90.25 — kept special vs strict-90 for margin on a large package). web/admin/api keep framework bars by design. Half the gaps were non-production code in the coverage denominator (test stubs, docs/examples instrumented by v8, pure types) fixed via excludes, not test-writing.
specs.origin: Surfaced after PR #1658 fixed the vitest sortSpecs crash that had masked the broken coverage gate; thresholds recalibrated to current floors as interim

specs.title: PlanPurchaseButton async-state tests broken post Astro 6 bump
Migrate shared packages to Zod 4 top-level format validators
Evaluate migrating apps/web from custom Zod env layer to astro:env
Security Audit — Dependency Vulnerabilities Remediation
specs.archiveNote: Phase-0 re-baseline (2026-06-22) found the gate already green: the 2 original blockers were resolved by intervening bumps (devalue HIGH -> 5.8.1 via Astro 6.4.7 PR #1700; sanitize-html CRITICAL advisory no longer matching). pnpm audit --prod --audit-level=high exits 0 and CI Security is green on staging. Scoped down (owner decision) to low-risk hardening: bumped dompurify 3.3.1->3.4.11 in apps/admin (cleared 16 advisories) + pnpm dedupe (cleared brace-expansion/postcss/yaml/smol-toml/markdown-it/@babel-core). Net 51->20 advisories, 0 critical/high. The dedupe had a side effect (promoted zod 4.3.6->4.4.3 via root range ^4.0.8, breaking Build/Guards/E2E with a .merge()-on-refined runtime throw) — fixed by pinning pnpm.overrides 'zod@>=4.0.0 <5':4.3.6 (scoped to 4.x so zod 3.x consumers like admin/vite.config z.function().args still work; also fixes a latent repo-wide risk; remove in SPEC-132 Zod migration). Remaining 20 moderate/low deferred to SPEC-263 (framework bumps + overrides) and documented in risk-accepted.md.

specs.title: AI Foundation Package (provider-agnostic @repo/ai-core)
specs.note: FOUNDATION spec for adding AI to Hospeda. Only the infra: @repo/ai-core package (provider-agnostic, Vercel AI SDK wrapped), admin-managed config (new PermissionEnum.AI_SETTINGS_MANAGE, SUPER_ADMIN), encrypted secrets vault (keys editable from admin, decrypted in apps/api, passed to package by param), usage metering + per-plan entitlement enforcement (login required for ALL AI, no anonymous), cost ceiling + kill-switch + threshold alerts via @repo/notifications, SSE streaming primitive, safety layer (rate-limit + injection guard + moderation + PII scrub for external telemetry), tables in @repo/db (NOT portable — conscious tradeoff, DB access isolated in storage/). Multi-provider = fallback + per-feature routing (V1); advanced routing + vector DB/embeddings + async jobs = V2. 4 V1 features (text improvement, NL search, accommodation chat, admin tech-support) are CHILD specs, out of scope here. Allocated SPEC-173 = max(git=172, engram-stale=144)+1. SS12 mandatory decision protocol: consult owner on ANY ambiguity. Tasks not yet atomized; 7 blocking open questions in spec.md SS8.

specs.title: Dependabot CI Hardening & Dependency Bump Merge Strategy
specs.note: Infra-only: CI build resilient to absent secrets in dependabot context + dependabot grouping/merge strategy + policy doc. Defers Zod 4.4 (.merge->.safeExtend) and TanStack Router 1.170 migrations to SPEC-132/SPEC-045 or follow-ups. Triggered by failing PRs #1548 (github-actions group, build secrets) and #1570 (66-update npm group, zod+router breaking). Planning for later, no worktree.

specs.title: Accommodation import from URL
specs.note: Import accommodation data from an external listing URL (Booking/Airbnb/etc) to pre-fill the create/edit form. JSON-LD/OG parsing primary + ai-core generate-object fallback. Human reviews draft before save. Drafted 2026-06-13, ready to implement.
specs.archiveNote: Smoke + legal copy shipped (smoke PR #1748). PostHog import-analytics events moved to SPEC-258 (A7). Short-link resolution follow-up = SPEC-257.

specs.title: Create post from data with AI
specs.note: Admin gives topic + key points, AI generates a post draft (title/summary/content). New 'post_generate' AiFeature + admin-tier streaming route, replicating the text-improve pattern. Drafted 2026-06-13, ready to implement.
specs.archiveNote: Shipped via PR #1737; full live Chrome smoke (T-015) GO with Ollama. 5 integration bugs fixed during smoke.

specs.title: Admin PostHog analytics dashboard
specs.note: Read PostHog Query/HogQL via a server-side proxy + dashboard datasource/widget in admin. Sibling of SPEC-225/226 (shared external-metrics proxy pattern). Drafted 2026-06-13, ready to implement.

specs.title: Admin Sentry errors dashboard
specs.note: Read Sentry Issues API via server-side proxy; fill the existing super.audit.log.sentry datasource placeholder + card H DeferredWidget. Distinct from SPEC-180 (capture hardening). Sibling of SPEC-224/226. Drafted 2026-06-13, ready to implement.

specs.title: Admin Brevo email/newsletter dashboard
specs.note: Read Brevo email/newsletter stats via server-side proxy (reuse existing HOSPEDA_EMAIL_API_KEY) + admin dashboard widget. Sibling of SPEC-224/225. Drafted 2026-06-13, ready to implement.

specs.title: Accommodation partial-update data loss — partial JSONB objects + shallow-merge nested columns
specs.renumberedReason: Collided with the already-merged SPEC-227 billing-subscription-observability; renumbered to next free (228 taken by web-loading-states).

specs.title: External-platform reviews & reputation on accommodation pages
specs.note: Show an accommodation's external-platform reputation on its detail page: Google real review snippets via official Places API + aggregate-only (rating+count+link) for Booking/Airbnb, clearly labeled. Separate stateful entity (two new tables) from internal reviews; never pollutes internal averageRating. Owner registers listings + per-platform/global toggles for link and reviews; constrained backend (refresh-via-button + cron, list-only, no user edit/delete). Google text TTL→degrade to aggregate. Sibling of SPEC-222 (shares safeExternalFetch/Apify/Places). This is the deferred reviews feature SPEC-222 excluded. Drafted 2026-06-15.
specs.renumberNote: Renumbered from SPEC-230 (collision with SPEC-230-list-soft-delete-filtering) during 2026-06-15 cleanup; soft-delete kept 230 as it was in active use.

specs.title: Web loading-states consistency & coverage
specs.note: ONE canonical loading toolkit (React Spinner/Skeleton + LoadingButton + convention doc) to replace the 'mil maneras' of showing loading (text '...', emoji, ad-hoc spinners). Phase 1 foundation, then migrate audited cases by priority: map zoom/pan sidebar (isFetching unused), eventos/publicaciones skeleton-swap parity, AiChatWidget thinking indicator, review modals, ContactHost double-submit, ConversationReply. From the 2026-06-13 web UX audit. Drafted, ready to implement.
specs.archiveNote: Merged to staging via PR #1739 (merge commit d17adf9d9). 22/22 tasks: canonical loading toolkit (Spinner/SkeletonCard/LoadingButton) + 15 island migrations + Astro skeleton-swaps + CI guard. Browser smoke + full CI green.

specs.title: AI Content Translation for Multi-Language Listings
specs.note: Renumbered from SPEC-212 (collided with SPEC-212-conversational-ai-search, which holds the 212 index entry). AI translation of accommodation/destination/event/post content into en/pt: i18n migration + schema fields + translate service + admin TranslationSection (collapsible, source-locale aware, only-missing) + web host translation panel + locale-aware SEO. Shipped via #1581 (core), #1623 (admin endpoint + UX/direction + host panel), #1652 (SEO i18n).

specs.title: Reduce apps/api per-file test cold-import overhead (~9% suite speedup)
specs.note: B2 lever extracted from SPEC-188 (~9% api test speedup via service-core mock + Sentry mock + shared vitest config). Reference impl on deleted branch spec/SPEC-188-vitest-test-performance (tip 9825dd9ff, perf commit d6c023179) was 1760 commits behind; re-implement fresh on staging, do NOT cherry-pick (stale service-core mock). Drafted 2026-06-15.
specs.renumberNote: Renumbered from SPEC-236 (collision with another agent already working SPEC-236) on 2026-06-15.

specs.title: Test suite order-independence hardening
specs.note: Follow-up discovered during SPEC-222. apps/api vitest suite has systemic cross-file order-dependency: module-scoped global mocks in test/setup.ts (notably the PlanService mock) leak across files under pool:forks/maxForks:3 fork distribution. --sequence.shuffle fails 6-16 tests/order; CI is green only on the deterministic order. Audit + fix the whole monorepo (api/admin/web/packages) then add a shuffle CI guard. accommodation-import.integration.test.ts itself is NOT flaky (9/9 orders) and needs no change. Drafted 2026-06-17.

specs.title: Mobile Testing Infrastructure
specs.origin: Spun off from SPEC-243 (2026-06-17): mobile app shipped Sub-0/3/4 verified headless-only; this spec builds the full RN testing system (RNTL render tests, Android emulator, E2E, CI).

specs.title: Revalidation log entity_id tracking + re-enable ACC-02 E2E
specs.origin: Follow-up from env-hardening PR #1712: revalidation_log.entity_id never written; ACC-02 E2E re-skipped until fixed.

specs.title: Multi-unit accommodation capacity model (hotels & complexes that rent per unit)
specs.origin: Surfaced during SPEC-217 write-gate smoke (2026-06-19): capacity cap blocked hotels; interim cap raised in PR #1733. Hotels/complexes (e.g. 10-cabin complex) rent per unit and need a real unit model, not a flat capacity triple. Owner to resolve product OQs before task generation.

specs.title: Commerce owner self-service web area (operational editing + force-password + credential email)
specs.origin: SPEC-239 staging-readiness smoke (2026-06-20): admin-sells loop missing the consumer-facing owner web surface

specs.title: Commerce owner editor — extended fields + single COMMERCE_EDIT_OWN permission
specs.origin: SPEC-249 close-out (2026-06-20): owner expanded the editable field set + collapsed per-section perms to a single COMMERCE_EDIT_OWN
specs.archiveNote: Shipped + validated via PR #1822 (merged to staging 2026-06-23). Root-cause fix was the missing 0029 enum migration (recreate permission_enum: drop 10 legacy commerce.*.editOwn, add commerce.editOwn) + interleaved data-migration re-granting commerce.editOwn. Task tracking was informal (31/31).

specs.title: Local DB dev/template refresh + worktree DB auto-heal correctness
specs.origin: SPEC-249 close-out: worktree DB cloned from a stale template (pre-SPEC-239); hospeda_dev also missing experiences table

specs.title: Extend apps/e2e with commerce-owner flows + seed fixtures
specs.origin: SPEC-249 T-025: apps/e2e exists (mature harness + CI); gaps are missing commerce tests and seed fixtures (no logueable experience owner, profile_completed=false)

specs.title: Asynchronous external reputation refresh (Apify async API + polling)
specs.origin: SPEC-237 staging-smoke follow-up (2026-06-20): manual refresh is synchronous+serial (~100s, Booking actor 73-120s). Owner chose polling not webhook. Decisions: separate run_status column, Booking JSON-LD fast-path stays inline, unified async refresh() shared by weekly cron, owner panel live status.

specs.title: Accommodation import short-link resolution + adapter enrichment
specs.origin: SPEC-222 Chrome smoke follow-up: Google maps.app.goo.gl short links do not resolve e2e (body-cap loses finalUrl); Booking Share-XXX = WAF (UX copy); Airbnb adapter missing summary/amenities/beds.

specs.title: Accommodation import — coverage gaps, limbo fields, UX surfacing & scraper resilience
specs.origin: SPEC-257 follow-up: close per-source coverage limbo, surface imported fields in the create UX, and add scraper anti-bot resilience.
specs.archiveNote: Shipped as 4 PRs to staging: #1809 (amenity-synonym resolver), #1816 (workstream A coverage + Airbnb actor fix), #1821 (workstream B onboarding persistence + mini-form), #1824 (workstream C.1 failure-mode differentiation). Doc-only spec, tasks never atomized. Workstream C scope split: C.4 import cache rejected (owner, staleness); remaining C resilience (C.2/C.3/C.5/C.6/C.7) carved out to SPEC-277. Deploy reminder: set HOSPEDA_APIFY_AIRBNB_ACTOR=tri_angle/airbnb-rooms-urls-scraper in Coolify api (staging+prod).

specs.title: Systematic Chrome smoke testing of staging features (post-e2fb184)
specs.origin: Campaign: real Chrome e2e smoke of features merged since e2fb184 lacking a complete smoke (SPEC-230, 203, 239, 249).

specs.title: AI Usage Dashboard
specs.archiveNote: 23/23 done. PR #1808 merged to staging (2026-06-23). Admin /ai/usage dashboard: 4 admin aggregation endpoints + hooks/search-params + page/guard/nav + totals/4 tables/2 recharts charts + i18n es/en/pt + real-DB reconciliation integration test + 43 component tests + a11y + docs. Fresh opus review (merge-after-fixes, no blockers) applied. My review caught 4 issues typecheck missed: 422 param-whitelist, a tautological reconciliation test (redone real-DB), test mocks breaking admin typecheck, JSON newline.

specs.title: Billing Promo-Code Typed Effect Engine
specs.origin: Owner request: promo codes that express free-forever, trial extension, and multi-cycle discount. Chose Option B (typed-effect engine) over subscription-ops.
specs.archiveNote: 14/15. T-001..T-013 + T-015 merged to staging (#1819 backend, #1829 web checkout UI, #1807/#1810 admin, #1814 regression, #1833 docs + closeout). Closed by owner request. T-014 (MercadoPago staging+prod smoke, billing-CORE gate) was deliberately NOT executed at archive time; it remains the owner's mandatory gate before staging->main, enforced independently by the billing-testing rule in CLAUDE.md regardless of spec status.

specs.title: Stabilize commerce-owner E2E and promote back to @p0

AI accommodation search — UI/UX improvements (transparency, onboarding, chat control, hybrid layout)
specs.origin: SPEC-199/212 follow-up: improve AI natural-language search UI/UX — surface interpretation (confidence), onboarding example queries, chat control + error clarity, and a layout/placement decision.

specs.title: Amenities & features catalog by vertical (scoping + i18n source-of-truth)
specs.origin: SPEC-249 follow-up: commerce verticals (gastronomy/experience) reuse the accommodation-only amenities/features catalog unfiltered. Scope the catalog by vertical + make i18n the SoT for display names. Absorbs BETA-90.

specs.title: Social Automation Backend
specs.origin: Design session 2026-06-20: replaces Airtable-based social automation (Custom GPT drafts -> backend -> admin review -> Make publish). Phases 1-4 core. Renumbered from SPEC-250. Follow-ups: SPEC-255 Airtable migration, SPEC-256 Custom-GPT-in-platform spike.
specs.archiveNote: Merged to staging via PR #1782 (52/52). Migration renumbered to 0026 after staging advanced.

specs.title: Accommodation media: remove composed blob shape from API responses
specs.note: SPEC-204 compat-debt cleanup: remove the composed media.featuredImage/gallery shape from accommodation API responses, migrate read-clients (web transforms/cards, admin score-signals/columns) to the relational AccommodationMedia[] list, and retire the photo fields from MediaSchema/HttpMediaSchema (videos stay). Absorbs SPEC-204 T-025 + T-028. Gated on SPEC-204 merge.

specs.title: SEO entity fields — Hybrid (keep title/description, remove keywords) + improve SEO tab UX
specs.origin: Owner question 2026-06-23: campos SEO en entidades existen pero probablemente no se usan. Decidir si keep & improve / remove / hybrid.

specs.title: Partners program — admin-sold monthly listing (new entity reusing sponsorship shape + commerce billing)
specs.origin: Owner request 2026-06-23: sistema de partners (comercios/ONG/instituciones) que pagan mensual, admin vende manualmente via QZPay link o pago manual, aparece en lista pública de partners.

specs.title: Occupancy calendar — Phase 1 manual (basic) + Phase 2/3 external sync (advanced)
specs.origin: Owner question 2026-06-23: calendario de ocupacion, inicialmente manual, con sync Google Calendar/Airbnb/Booking. 3 phases: manual → Google → iCal.

specs.title: AI image enhancement + manual editing (crop, rotate, filters) for all entity images
specs.origin: Owner question 2026-06-23: mejora de imagenes por IA + edicion manual (crop, rotate, etc) para todas las imagenes (alojamientos, eventos, posts, etc).

specs.title: Stock image search & import (Unsplash/Pexels) — admin editor, v1
specs.origin: Owner question 2026-06-23: busqueda de imagenes e importacion para eventos y posts. Integrar Unsplash/Pexels en el editor.

specs.title: Web — What's New dialog + Welcome Tour for hosts and commerce owners in /mi-cuenta
specs.origin: Owner request 2026-06-23: soportar whats new y welcome en /mi-cuenta de app web para users hosts y commerce. Portear SPEC-174/175 del admin a la web.

specs.title: Feature flag system — DB-backed on/off toggles with user & role override (dark launch + kill switch)
specs.origin: Owner question 2026-06-23: sistema de feature flag. DB-backed, admin-managed, gradual rollout, kill switches.

specs.title: Accommodation import — scraper resilience (retry, fallback chain, async, provider mitigation, manual path)
specs.origin: SPEC-258 workstream C follow-up: after C.1 (failure-mode differentiation) shipped and the import cache (C.4) was rejected, the remaining resilience levers (retry/backoff, per-source fallback chain, async path reusing SPEC-250, provider mitigation, guaranteed manual path) get their own spec.
specs.archiveNote: 11/11 tasks: R1 retry/backoff, R2 per-source Generic fallback, R4 provider-mitigation runbook, R5 manual-path invariant. R3 (async path) deferred to SPEC-281. Shipped via PR #1848 (CI green); R2/R4 + runbook move appended to the same PR per owner. Pending final merge to staging.

specs.title: MercadoLibre OAuth refresh-token flow (make the ML import tier production-viable)
specs.origin: Formalizes Linear BETA-96. The MercadoLibre import tier uses a static 6h access token with no refresh, so it dies silently in prod. Replace with OAuth 2.0 authorization-code + refresh-token rotation + a token service. Unblocks SPEC-258 A3 (ML enrichment). Discovered during SPEC-258 workstream A.

specs.title: Cross-user data transfer (entity ownership migration A → B)
specs.origin: Renumbered from SPEC-263 (number collision: SPEC-263 already taken by security-deps-moderate-remediation in staging). Admin-driven feature to migrate entity ownership from user A to user B incl. billing/entitlements. HIGH RISK — draft-exploration, blocked for dev until open questions in spec sections 8/9 are closed.

specs.title: Accommodation import — async extraction path for slow/blocked sources (SPEC-277 R3)
specs.origin: SPEC-277 R3 deferred: the async extraction path (202+poll reusing SPEC-250 helpers) is the heaviest lever (two client surfaces + new route shape) and was carved out of SPEC-277 into its own follow-up.

specs.title: Graduated Per-Plan AI Usage Limits
specs.origin: Split out of the SPEC-282 (plan comparison table) review: the owner chose to advertise AI as available now and make graduated per-plan AI usage limits (reverting SPEC-211 G-2/G-4 on the metering axis) a separate formal spec. OQ-1/2/4/5/6 resolved 2026-06-26; OQ-3 (numeric values) deferred to implementation.

specs.title: Personalized Recommendations Feed
specs.origin: Surfaced during SPEC-282 review: CAN_VIEW_RECOMMENDATIONS is a phantom gate (route not built). Build the recommendations feed.

specs.title: Owner Promotions — Tourist-Facing Display
specs.origin: Surfaced during SPEC-282 review: owner-create side of promotions is built, tourist-facing display is not (public route unregistered, no UI). Complete the loop.

specs.title: Alerts & Offers — Multichannel Notifications
specs.origin: Surfaced during SPEC-282 review (replaces the mislabeled 'Promo VIP' row). Merges phantom price alerts + owner-promo offers into one multichannel (email/whatsapp/push) per-plan-limited feature.

specs.title: Favorites Collections — Per-Plan Limits
specs.origin: Surfaced during SPEC-282 review: collections feature is built but capped by env var, not billing. Move to a per-plan billing LimitKey (free tourist excluded, paid plans graduated).

specs.title: Accommodation Comparison
specs.origin: Surfaced during SPEC-282 review: CAN_COMPARE_ACCOMMODATIONS + MAX_COMPARE_ITEMS are a phantom gate. Build side-by-side comparison with per-plan differences.

specs.title: Search History
specs.origin: Surfaced during SPEC-282 review: CAN_VIEW_SEARCH_HISTORY is a phantom gate. Build search history with per-plan differences.

specs.title: Owner Review Responses
specs.origin: Surfaced during SPEC-282 owner-side audit: RESPOND_REVIEWS is a phantom gate (no reply endpoint, no owner_reply column). Build owner replies to reviews.

specs.title: Accommodation Verification Badge
specs.origin: Surfaced during SPEC-282 owner-side audit: HAS_VERIFICATION_BADGE is dead filter code (no DB column, no producer, no render). Build the verification badge.

specs.title: Featured Listing Management
specs.origin: Surfaced during SPEC-282 owner-side audit: accommodation.isFeatured has a DB column + search sort + a cosmetic admin toggle, but NO API route sets it and FEATURED_LISTING is never enforced. Make featuring real and entitlement-wired.

specs.title: Owner Custom Branding
specs.origin: Surfaced during SPEC-282 owner-side audit: CUSTOM_BRANDING is a billing flag only (no DB field, route, or UI). Define and build custom branding for premium owners.
